task:
You are working in /Users/yorrickjansen/work/claude-code-plugins. Read and implement the plan at /Users/yorrickjansen/work/claude-code-plugins/docs/plans/2026-03-16-engine-default-progress-logging.md. The plan has 2 steps:

**Step 1:** Modify /Users/yorrickjansen/work/claude-code-plugins/dev-loop/scripts/engine.py to add default progress logging to StateGraph.run() and _run_node(). When no on_node_start/on_node_end callbacks are registered, automatically print progress lines to stderr. Add 'import sys' and 'import time' at top. Add _format_elapsed() helper. In run(), check 'use_default_log = not self._on_node_start and not self._on_node_end', then print '[workflow] Starting: node_name' before execution and '[workflow] Finished: node_name (Xm XXs)' after, and '[workflow] ERROR in node_name: error' on errors. Same for _run_node() which handles parallel nodes.

**Step 2:** Add tests in /Users/yorrickjansen/work/claude-code-plugins/dev-loop/tests/test_engine.py:
- test_default_logging_when_no_callbacks: graph with start->a->END, assert stderr has [workflow] lines
- test_default_logging_suppressed_with_callbacks: same graph but register on_node_start, assert no [workflow] in stderr
- test_error_logging_on_failure: node that raises, assert stderr has [workflow] ERROR

Read the existing files first before making changes.
